_meta.purpose: Per-county ArcGIS endpoint registry with canonical-field mappings. Lovable reads this to wire each county's appraisal-district parcel layer into the JVLOT search/display UI.

parcel_id.label: Parcel ID
parcel_id.description: Primary unique identifier per parcel within the county

account_number.label: Account Number
account_number.description: Alternate ID often used in CAD systems and on tax bills

situs_address.label: Property Address
situs_address.description: Site address — physical location of the parcel

acres.label: Acres
acres.description: Preferred order: legal acreage, then GIS-calculated. Hill Country users care most about this

legal_description.label: Legal Description
legal_description.description: Some counties split this across multiple fields (legal_dscr_1..4) — concat with space

Bexar.notes: Layer copyright says last update Sept 2019; verify freshness before launch.

Harris.notes: situs_address must be assembled in client from site_str_num + site_str_name + site_str_sfx. Year built and bedrooms not exposed by HCAD's parcel layer.

Travis.notes: VALUE-POOR LAYER: TCAD_public layer has no owner or value fields. JVLOT will need a Realie supplement for Travis to show owner/value. The hyperlink field returns a TCAD detail URL for each parcel — useful as a fallback.

Dallas.notes: STATEDAREA is text — parse to number client-side. Layer is 4 (ParcelPublishing) within ParcelQuery MapServer.

Tarrant.notes: Most complete schema in Tier A — has bedrooms, bathrooms, year_built. Legal desc must be concatenated from LEGAL_1..4.

Collin.notes: All field names use the GIS_DBO_AD_Entity_ prefix because the layer joins two tables. Layer ID is 1 (NOT 0). Updated weekly Friday.

Denton.notes: Service rotates yearly — current is LinkedParcels2026, layer 3. Recheck the service name annually (look for LinkedParcels2027 etc.) and update endpoint.

Williamson.notes: Geometry field is uppercase SHAPE (not Shape). Schema is wide (140+ fields) with several aliases for the same value — the mapping above picks the canonical/preferred field per concept.

Fort Bend.notes: Layer ID is 1 (NOT 0; /0 returns 500). Data updated biannually per service description.

Galveston.warning: Value fields are VAL23TOT/VAL23LAND/VAL23IMP — appears to be 2023 vintage; verify freshness against current GCAD certified roll before launch. Parcels layer ID is 29, not 0.
Galveston.notes: Day 2 retry — real layer is 29 (Day 1 wrongly assumed 0). Hosted by City of Galveston GIS, copyright Galveston Central Appraisal District.

Brazoria.notes: Layer 1 ('Parcel Information') is the full BCAD-derived parcel layer. Layer 0 is 'Flagged Parcels' only — DO NOT use layer 0. No mailing address, year built, or value breakdown — Realie supplement recommended.

Montgomery.notes: Schema fields (SBL, SWIS, MUNI, VLG_TAXABL) resemble New York State assessor template — likely seeded from a generic template. Verify a few records manually before launch. Object ID is OBJECTID_1, NOT OBJECTID.

Hays.notes: BIS Consulting-hosted ArcGIS Online service via utility.arcgis.com proxy. ObjectID field is ObjectID_1. No year_built / living_area / bedrooms — Realie supplement may be needed for property characteristics.

Comal.notes: BIS Consulting standard schema (Hill Country pattern). No property characteristics — Realie supplement recommended for year_built/bedrooms/living_area.

Kendall.notes: BIS Consulting standard schema (Hill Country pattern).

Burnet.notes: BIS Consulting standard schema. Service name has '1' suffix: BurnetCADWebService1. spatialReference 102739 (NAD 1983 StatePlane Texas Central).

Bandera.notes: BIS Consulting standard schema. Real Bandera CAD = bancad.org (NOT banderacad.org which is a third-party search portal).

Medina.warning: REFERER-LOCKED: this endpoint returns HTTP 403 when fetched directly from outside the BIS app. Schema confirmed via in-app fetch but JVLOT will likely need a server-side proxy or referer-spoofing. DO NOT WIRE INTO PRODUCTION until access pattern is resolved.
Medina.notes: BIS Consulting standard schema (assumed identical to other BIS counties since BIS uses a uniform parcel template). Day 2 issue.

Wilson.notes: BIS Consulting standard schema. Domain has hyphen: wilson-cad.org (NOT www.wilsoncad.org which DNS-fails).

Guadalupe.notes: BIS Consulting standard schema. Direct neighbor of Bexar (east — Seguin).

Caldwell.notes: BIS schema, hosted on services.arcgis.com (public AGOL tenant) instead of utility.arcgis.com. Likely CORS-friendly with no referer requirement.

Fayette.notes: BIS standard schema. Web Mercator (102100) — different SR from most BIS counties.

Uvalde.warning: REFERER-LOCKED: returns HTTP 403 from outside the BIS app. Same issue as Medina. Server-side proxy or referer-spoofing needed. DO NOT WIRE INTO PRODUCTION until access pattern is resolved.
Uvalde.notes: BIS schema (assumed identical). Discovered Day 2 extended push.

Karnes.notes: No public ArcGIS endpoint. CAD site has no map link; gis.bisclient.com/karnescad returns 404. Use Realie.

Goliad.notes: BIS app at gis.bisclient.com/goliadcad/ loads but parcels FeatureServer didn't initialize within wait window. Try again on a future run with longer wait or by inspecting BIS config.json.

DeWitt.notes: No public ArcGIS endpoint via BIS path (404). Use Realie.

Gonzales.notes: No public ArcGIS endpoint via BIS path (404). Use Realie.

Live Oak.notes: No public ArcGIS endpoint via BIS path (404). Use Realie.

Frio.notes: No public ArcGIS endpoint via BIS path (404). Use Realie.

Maverick.notes: No public ArcGIS endpoint via BIS path (404). Use Realie.

Val Verde.notes: No public ArcGIS endpoint via BIS path (404). Use Realie.

San Saba.notes: No public ArcGIS endpoint via BIS path (404). Use Realie.

Austin.warning: This is the rural Austin County (west of Houston) — NOT the city of Austin (which is in Travis County).

Colorado.notes: BIS standard schema. Texas county Colorado, not the state.

Brazos.notes: BIS standard schema. Tier C metro (College Station / Texas A&M).

Milam.notes: No public ArcGIS endpoint via BIS path (404). Use Realie.

Bell.notes: BIS standard schema. Tier C metro (Killeen / Temple).

McLennan.notes: No public ArcGIS endpoint via BIS path (404). Tier C metro (Waco). Use Realie.

Lampasas.warning: REFERER-LOCKED: HTTP 403 from outside the BIS app. Same issue as Medina/Uvalde.
